name: docker
description: Protects Docker environments from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:docker:block-system-prune
smartRules.reason: docker system prune removes all unused containers, images, and volumes — blocked by Docker shield

smartRules.name: shield:docker:block-volume-prune
smartRules.reason: docker volume prune destroys all unused volumes and their data — blocked by Docker shield

smartRules.name: shield:docker:block-rm-force
smartRules.reason: Force-removing running containers is destructive — blocked by Docker shield

smartRules.name: shield:docker:review-volume-rm
smartRules.reason: Volume removal deletes persistent data and requires human approval (Docker shield)

smartRules.name: shield:docker:review-stop-kill
smartRules.reason: Stopping or killing containers requires human approval (Docker shield)

smartRules.name: shield:docker:review-image-rm
smartRules.reason: Image removal requires human approval (Docker shield)

smartRules.name: shield:docker:review-rmi-force
smartRules.reason: Force image removal requires human approval (Docker shield)
